clustering.selection_rationale: Resolution 0.6 retained at least 90 barcodes per cluster and had the highest agreement with the archived Scanpy partition; resolution 1.5 was retained as a legacy sensitivity result.

markers.provisional_annotation_rule: top panel z >= 0.5, margin >= 0.25, and mean detection >= 0.02

limitations: One combined biological sample label; technical wells are not biological replicates.
Doublet filtering was not applied because a validated platform-specific expected doublet rate was not archived.
Provisional marker-panel labels require manual and reference-based review.
Resolution 0.6 is a conservative computational choice, not proof of eight biological cell types.
Resolution 1.5 produced 12 rather than 14 clusters and included a two-barcode outlier cluster.
